diffs.raw_diff:
diff --git a/packages/ai/src/providers/openai-completions.ts b/packages/ai/src/providers/openai-completions.ts
index c4332b3c..5724ad93 100644
--- a/packages/ai/src/providers/openai-completions.ts
+++ b/packages/ai/src/providers/openai-completions.ts
@@ -763,6 +763,7 @@ function detectCompat(model: Model<"openai-completions">): Required<OpenAIComple
 		provider === "mistral" ||
 		baseUrl.includes("mistral.ai") ||
 		baseUrl.includes("chutes.ai") ||
+		baseUrl.includes("deepseek.com") ||
 		isZai ||
 		provider === "opencode" ||
 		baseUrl.includes("opencode.ai");

message: fix(ai): detect DeepSeek URLs and disable unsupported developer role
